div.head: Mr. Egan to Mr. Blaine.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Santiago, October 30, 1891. (Received October 31.)

div.p: Mr. Egan reports that the investigation of the assault upon the Baltimore’s men is secret; that, as he is informed, Capt. Schley and the United States consul have received from the judge of crime an invitation to submit evidence and will refer the application to the legation, and that he will await instructions.
